image_required.title: Image required
image_required.description: You must upload an image file to continue.

images_required.title: Images required
images_required.description: You must upload at least one image file to continue.

invalid_upload.title: Invalid upload
invalid_upload.description: The uploaded file could not be processed.

image_limit_reached.title: Image limit reached
image_limit_reached.description: You can upload at most {maximum} images. Current: {current}. Remaining: {remaining}.
